testpoints.name: lui_instruction
testpoints.description: LUI: upper immediate loaded into rd, writeback_value = imm_u.

testpoints.name: auipc_instruction
testpoints.description: AUIPC: PC + upper immediate written back.

testpoints.name: jal_instruction
testpoints.description: JAL: jump and link, branch_request=1, writeback=PC+4, is_jmp=1.

testpoints.name: jalr_call_instruction
testpoints.description: JALR: register jump with call semantics (rd!=0), branch_request=1, is_call=1.

testpoints.name: jalr_return_instruction
testpoints.description: JALR with rs1=x1 (ra): return semantics, is_ret=1.

testpoints.name: beq_taken
testpoints.description: BEQ: equal operands, branch taken, is_taken=1.

testpoints.name: beq_not_taken
testpoints.description: BEQ: unequal operands, branch not taken, is_not_taken=1.

testpoints.name: bne_taken
testpoints.description: BNE: unequal operands, branch taken, is_taken=1.

testpoints.name: blt_signed_taken
testpoints.description: BLT: signed less-than true, branch taken.

testpoints.name: bge_signed_taken
testpoints.description: BGE: signed greater-or-equal true, branch taken.

testpoints.name: bltu_unsigned_taken
testpoints.description: BLTU: unsigned less-than true, branch taken.

testpoints.name: bgeu_unsigned_not_taken
testpoints.description: BGEU: unsigned less-than false (not taken), branch not taken.

testpoints.name: addi_immediate
testpoints.description: ADDI: ADD immediate from I-type instruction, writeback=rs1+imm.

testpoints.name: add_register
testpoints.description: ADD: register ADD, uses ALU with funct3=0 and funct7=0.

testpoints.name: sub_register
testpoints.description: SUB: register SUB, uses ALU with funct3=0 and funct7[5]=1.

testpoints.name: load_address_compute
testpoints.description: Load: computes address via ALU ADD (rs1 + imm_i) for memory access.

testpoints.name: store_address_compute
testpoints.description: Store: computes address via ALU ADD (rs1 + imm_s) for memory access.

testpoints.name: ecall_system_trap
testpoints.description: ECALL: environment call, generates branch trap request.

testpoints.name: ebreak_breakpoint
testpoints.description: EBREAK: breakpoint, generates branch trap request.

testpoints.name: invalid_instruction_trap
testpoints.description: Invalid instruction: opcode_invalid=1, generates branch trap request.

testpoints.name: hold_stall
testpoints.description: Hold asserted: pipeline stalled, all outputs remain unchanged from previous cycle.

testpoints.name: fence_nop
testpoints.description: FENCE: no execution changes, writeback=0.

testpoints.name: xor_register
testpoints.description: XOR: register XOR via ALU funct3=4.

testpoints.name: xori_immediate
testpoints.description: XORI: immediate XOR, funct3=4 on opcode 0x13.

testpoints.name: no_valid_instruction
testpoints.description: No valid instruction: all outputs default to 0, no ALU operation.
